Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Louis Dillon, Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS STEPHANIE COSTANZA AND HERBERT GROSSER'S Motion For Order Dimissing Plaintiff's Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court'S Prior Order And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Plaintiff has paid the sanctions. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Dimissing Pltf'S Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court'S Prior Order And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - LOUIS DILLON, TEL. NO. 378-8259, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS STEPHANIE COSTANZA'S Motion For Order Dimissing Plaintiff's Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court's Prior Order And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. - The motion is continued to November 30, 2011. Plaintiff shall pay the $445 discovery sanction by November 28, 2011.
If the sanction is not paid, then the Court will dismiss this action. Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported. = (302/MLM)
